kendra.index.valueimportanceitem.CfnAbou: Specifies a key-value pair of the search boost value for a document when the key is part of the metadata of a document.

kendra.index.valueimportanceitem.Key.Description: The document metadata value used for the search boost.

kendra.index.valueimportanceitem.Value.Description: The boost value for a document when the key is part of the metadata of a document.
